jobDescription: YOUR PROFILEUniversity degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems or related fields or equivalent industry experience Software engineer with a strong background in either release engineering or distributed systems infrastructure Experience with release processes involving Unix family systems and cloud infrastructure, preferably AWS  Experience with both infrastructure and image level tooling such as Chef, Puppet, Packer, Cloud Formation or Terraform and understanding how toolings fit together Experience with container management and orchestrations systems Fluency in English is a must YOUR RESPONSIBILITIESRaisin is looking for a highly motivated, smart and driven engineer to complement our international and diverse team in Berlin to assist in migration from a traditional hosting service to EKS (kubernetes) running at AWS. Co-ownership of the improvement of our CI and CD pipelines You assure scalability, stability and efficiency of the CI-solution Enable other developers and teams to deliver on their own Extend growing production and development environments  Provide Dev Ops and SRE expertise and best practices to a growing team of engineers Support and mentor to developers, and junior team members Help maintain a growing runbook and documentation store OUR BENEFITSBe part of a diverse team of more than 34 different nationalities, who strongly believes in agile cross-functional methods, collaboration and appreciation in our daily work. We are professional and work hard to always be the best in our field. You find us in our open office in beautiful Prenzlauer Berg well connected to public transport and surrounded by a great variety of restaurants and supermarkets. Relocation and visa support as well as a relocation reimbursement Personal training budget of 1,700 € and four full training days Free choice of hardware Beginner German classes directly at the office and financial support for acquiring a language certificate Hungry all the time? Breakfast, snacks, daily fresh fruit as well as drinks are provided Stay up to date at regular townhall sessions with our founders and feel free to ask any kinds of questions Flexible working hours, home office and 28 vacation days Enjoy more than 50+ different sports with Urban Sports Club: We subsidize your membership with more than 20 € per month We offer you a company pension scheme ( Betriebliche Altersvorsorge), which we support with 20 % Enjoy yearly company retreats to exciting European cities and other team events, such as Lunch Lottery, Tech Lunch, Xletix and Raisin Ladies Events
